name: Mob.com
description: Chinese mobile data SDK platform (MobTech) providing ShareSDK, SMSSDK, MobLink deep-linking and analytics.

seo.title: Mob.com — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Mob.com: Chinese mobile data SDK platform (MobTech) providing ShareSDK, SMSSDK, MobLink deep-linking and analytics.

when_to_use: ShareSDK for social login and sharing across Chinese social platforms
SMS verification via SMSSDK for Chinese app user authentication
MobLink deep linking for Chinese app ecosystem without Google
Unified analytics and attribution SDK for Chinese Android app ecosystem

pros: ShareSDK, SMS and deep linking in one Chinese SDK
Massive footprint in the Chinese mobile ecosystem
Free and low-cost entry for Chinese apps
Mature tooling for local use cases
cons: Heavy regulatory and data-residency risk outside China
Compliance concerns under GDPR and CCPA
review.verdict: Useful SDK suite inside China, but the compliance and geopolitical profile rules it out for most Western apps.
review.best_for: Chinese-market apps needing local SDK utilities and deep links at low cost.
review.not_for: EU, US or regulated apps with strict data residency and privacy requirements.
